channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Luca House flats, 1, Mays Hill Rd, Shortlands - white pen tag about 20cm long on the middle 2m high solid brown unpainted fence panel butting the public footway., 17th April
item.description:
Luca House flats, 1, Mays Hill Rd, Shortlands - white pen tag about 20cm long on the middle 2m high solid brown unpainted fence panel butting the public footway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): May's Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old rear wooden 7 foot high solid fence of Greatstone House near the bottom of Evelina Close, Penge cul-de-sac - about 2sqm of spray tags., 17th April
item.description:
Old rear wooden 7 foot high solid fence of Greatstone House near the bottom of Evelina Close, Penge cul-de-sac - about 2sqm of spray tags.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evelina Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2, 4 and 6, Croydon Rd, Penge - shop frontage window frames and roller shutter frames - numerous eg about 100 pen tags and small square 'shutter repair company' self adhesive stickers flyposted., 17th April
item.description:
2, 4 and 6, Croydon Rd, Penge - shop frontage window frames and roller shutter frames - numerous eg about 100 pen tags and small square 'shutter repair company' self adhesive stickers flyposted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking bollard has been knocked over, 17th April
item.description:
Parking bollard has been knocked by a vehicle reversing off drive. This is becoming very regular occurrence. The bollard has been removed and placed on the pavement causing a trip/accident

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Lewis Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black painted solid wooden gates of the Pawleyne Arms PH fronting Croydon Rd 10m from the jct with High Street Penge - about 1sqm of gold paint spray tagging, 17th April
item.description:
Black painted solid wooden gates of the Pawleyne Arms PH fronting Croydon Rd 10m from the jct with High Street Penge - about 1sqm of gold paint spray tagging.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 156, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 17th April
item.description:
Yet again the street light outside 202 Green Lane is not working. Previously reported and claimed to have been fixed but there’s obviously an ongoing problem with it as it stops working every few weeks. This is a security issue for the houses in the vicinity as this part of Green Lane is in complete darkness
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 17th April
item.description:
Graffiti tags all over fence next to new flats

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement is cracked and has a hole in it and us a big tripping hazard, 17th April
item.description:
Pavement is cracked and has a hole in it and us a big tripping hazard - it has been like this for a few months atleast

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckingham Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out AGAIN, 17th April
item.description:
This light keeps going out please sort this out once and for all. Fed up with it going out. It’s dangerous. Last time my husband nearly reversed into someone on the pavement!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing utiliities / Manhole cover, 17th April
item.description:
Outside 72 herbert road there is a missing utilities cover. This is a serious tripping hazard. Not sure what company owns this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cable run across pavement, 17th April
item.description:
Car Charging cable running across the pavement in busy shopping street. This is here on a daily basis and runs from the first floor window. When not in use it is left behind an old piece of wood. This street is busy with elderly and less mobile people regularly having to cross this cable to get to the chemist and post office which are nearby,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These potholes are a hazard to motorcycles . I drive a motorcycle and the size of these holes are dangerous the human life it is outrageous that they have not been fixed. Bromley you are playing with human life!!!!, 17th April
item.description:
These are dangerous to cyclists and motorcyclists car drivers and humans It’s outrageous that they are not filled in. A motorcycle front wheel in one of these can cause you tibia into on owning traffic . Bromley your playing with people’s lives for a small filling of tarmac!!!!! Anerly road opposite Tescos se19

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Frequent dog poos and littering, 17th April
item.description:
Frequent dog poos and bad littering most of them being dangerous for children. Please bring in either a fine system or frequent checks. It’s disgusting and causes serious harm to children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Frequent dog poos and littering, 17th April
item.description:
Frequent dog poos and bad littering most of them being dangerous for children. Please bring in either a fine system or frequent checks. It’s disgusting and causes serious harm to children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 17th April
item.description:
This car has been here for a good few months, never been moved its 2 left tires are flat and have been stabbed. It’s taking up space where a previous run down car was parked for months on end.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Legatt Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large speedhump has 3 potholes, 17th April
item.description:
Large speedhump has 3 large potholes travelling towards Merlin road ,I have reported this before but nothing has been done about it,cars have to steer on the other side of the road to miss the large holes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking space being ‘reserved’ with a bin, 17th April
item.description:
The people at 98 Longhill Road are ‘reserving’ a parking space outside their property by putting their bin in the road. This is causing an obstruction and I believe may be illegal under the Highways Act 1980.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longhill Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost loose, 17th April
item.description:
Lamppost outside number 41 has been knocked, it has moved and tarmac loose, Conway came and looked and drove away
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ingleton Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadworks barriers blocking the pavement., 17th April
item.description:
Anyone who uses a wheelchair or push chair will be forced to go in the road to proceed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wydeville Manor Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair flytipped by penpoll and wilton, 17th April
item.description:
Chair flytipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Penpoll Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
